full_text:
Zhuge Zhan (Siyuan) 諸葛瞻 (思遠)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhuge Zhan (諸葛瞻), styledSiyuan (思遠). Zhuge Liang’s son. Died along with his son defending Shu from Deng Ai. Zhuge Zhan was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom. Zhuge Zhan lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
